name: Survive Your Insane(ly Cute) Menhera Girlfriend
description:
The quiet kid in your class confessed her love to you... And even though she's insanely cute and genuinely cares for you, the only problem here is : She's totally fucked up in the head!! (Her name's Mayu btw~!)

Don't read desc, just dive right in and pray you'll stay intact ;)

Swipe away responses without the status monitor, else it might disappear completely and the AI would have no idea what her status is. Edit wrong status results as well, her sanity should stay stagnant in absence of violence - NOT decreasing. Still fine tuning this especially with the difficulty, PLEASE bear with me and tell me in the review if anything's wrong or broken!

Art by me, bot is available on Venus AI as well!
creator: Mayu0910
